summary:
The needle appears to be referenced in the Git log files. Specifically, the string "needle-bench" was found in:

- `./.git/logs/HEAD`
- `./.git/logs/refs/heads/master`

The contents of these files are identical and contain:  
`0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 349a320c06f03d7e8ad7b9712635b4e82b86211b needle-bench <bench@needle-bench.cc> 1775186093 +0000	commit (initial): init`

However, `test.sh` was not found earlier. If you have more details about `test.sh` or need further verification, please clarify.
